Use the endCursor from the previous page's PageInfo for GraphQL APIs.","type":"string"},"direction":{"description":"Order direction. If provided, the 'orderBy' also needs to be provided.","enum":["ASC","DESC"],"type":"string"},"labels":{"description":"Filter by labels","items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},"orderBy":{"description":"Order issues by field. If provided, the 'direction' also needs to be provided.","enum":["CREATED_AT","UPDATED_AT","COMMENTS"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Repository owner","type":"string"},"perPage":{"description":"Results per page for pagination (min 1, max 100)","maximum":100,"minimum":1,"type":"number"},"repo":{"description":"Repository name","type":"string"},"since":{"description":"Filter by date (ISO 8601 timestamp)","type":"string"},"state":{"description":"Filter by state, by default both open and closed issues are returned when not provided","enum":["OPEN","CLOSED"],"type":"string"}},"required":["owner","repo"],"type":"object"},"name":"list_issues"},{"annotations":{"readOnlyHint":true,"title":"Search issues"},"description":"Search for issues in GitHub repositories using issues search syntax already scoped to is:issue","icons":[{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"light"},{"mimeType":"image/png","src":"data:image/png;base64,","theme":"dark"}],"inputSchema":{"properties":{"order":{"description":"Sort order","enum":["asc","desc"],"type":"string"},"owner":{"description":"Optional repository owner. 2026-03-19T06:03:58.1733593Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-19T06:02:24.528758395Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"issue_number":57243,"method":"get","owner":"Azure","repo":"azure-sdk-for-net"},"name":"issue_read"}}}
2026-03-19T06:03:58.1749050Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-19T06:02:24.864009281Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57243,\"title\":\"MPG: Tag methods should not be generated when PATCH operation has no request body\",\"body\":\"## Description\\n\\nThe current MPG (Management Plane Generator) does not check whether a PATCH operation accepts a request body before deciding to generate tag methods (`AddTag`/`SetTags`/`RemoveTag`). If a resource has a `tags` property (e.g. inherits from `TrackedResource`) and has a PATCH operation that takes **no request body**, the generator may still produce tag methods — but those methods would be non-functional since there is no way to write updated tags back to the service via the bodyless PATCH.\\n\\n## Current Behavior\\n\\nIn `ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods()` ([ResourceClientProvider.cs#L409](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Providers/ResourceClientProvider.cs#L409)), the tag generation gate is:\\n\\n```csharp\\nif (HasTags() \\u0026amp;\\u0026amp; _readMethod is not null \\u0026amp;\\u0026amp; updateMethodProvider is not null)\\n```\\n\\n`updateMethodProvider` is set to non-null whenever a `ResourceOperationKind.Create` (PUT) or `ResourceOperationKind.Update` (PATCH) method exists (line 382), **regardless of whether the PATCH operation accepts a body parameter**.\\n\\nThe fallback path in `BaseTagMethodProvider.BuildElseStatements()` ([BaseTagMethodProvider.cs#L228](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Providers/TagMethodProviders/BaseTagMethodProvider.cs#L228)) then does:\\n\\n```csharp\\nvar updateParam = _updateMethodProvider.Signature.Parameters\\n    .Where(p =\\u0026gt; !p.Type.Equals(typeof(WaitUntil))).First();\\n```\\n\\nThis assumes a body parameter exists. For a bodyless PATCH, this would either crash or produce nonsensical code.\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe generator should **skip tag method generation** when:\\n- The resource has no PUT (`CreateOrUpdate`) operation, **and**\\n- The PATCH (`Update`) operation has **no request body** (i.e. no parameter to carry tag changes)\\n\\n## Evidence from Existing SDKs\\n\\nAnalysis of the existing generated SDKs shows this pattern clearly. Among the 34 `TrackedResourceData` resources without tag methods in the current repo:\\n\\n| Category | Count |\\n|---|---|\\n| No PATCH at all | 16 |\\n| PATCH exists but has no body | 16 |\\n| Has full CRUD (anomaly, AppService only) | 2 |\\n\\n**None** of the 34 have a PATCH with a body. Resources with bodyless PATCHes include:\\n- `ProviderMonitorSettingResource` (ProviderHub) — `UpdateAsync(CancellationToken)`\\n- `AppServiceCertificateOrderResource` (CertificateRegistration)\\n- `CosmosDBFleetResource` (CosmosDB)\\n- `LabPlanResource` / `LabResource` (LabServices)\\n- And 11 others\\n\\nIn contrast, **all 568** `TrackedResourceData` resources that correctly have tag methods also have either a PUT or a PATCH **with a body parameter**.\\n\\n## Suggested Fix\\n\\nIn `ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods()`, add a check that the update method has a meaningful body parameter before generating tag methods. For example, in `PopulateUpdateClient()` or at the tag generation gate, verify that the PATCH method\\u0026#39;s input model contains parameters beyond `WaitUntil` and `CancellationToken`.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57243\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-19T06:00:05Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-19T06:00:05Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

We need to do this WITHOUT connecting to a data factory.\\r\\n\\r\\nToday we have to COPY definition of settings and maintain them on our side. \\r\\n\\r\\nLooking at the source code, these are static in nature, unless some extra customization is in custom init method. Even then, maybe a base setting could be made available in a new API surface.\\r\\n\\r\\nScenarios\\r\\n- Deserialize linkedservice that is passed as parameter by data factory to batch as part of 2026-03-19T06:03:58.1920094Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-19T06:03:02.112675539Z","direction":"OUT","type":"REQUEST","server_id":"github","method":"tools/call","payload":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"arguments":{"perPage":5,"query":"repo:Azure/azure-sdk-for-net is:issue MPG generator tag methods management"},"name":"search_issues"}}}
2026-03-19T06:03:58.1961292Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-19T06:03:02.593303598Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"total_count\":2,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4099515891,\"number\":57243,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"MPG: Tag methods should not be generated when PATCH operation has no request body\",\"body\":\"## Description\\n\\nThe current MPG (Management Plane Generator) does not check whether a PATCH operation accepts a request body before deciding to generate tag methods (`AddTag`/`SetTags`/`RemoveTag`). If a resource has a `tags` property (e.g. inherits from `TrackedResource`) and has a PATCH operation that takes **no request body**, the generator may still produce tag methods — but those methods would be non-functional since there is no way to write updated tags back to the service via the bodyless PATCH.\\n\\n## Current Behavior\\n\\nIn `ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods()` ([ResourceClientProvider.cs#L409](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Providers/ResourceClientProvider.cs#L409)), the tag generation gate is:\\n\\n```csharp\\nif (HasTags() \\u0026\\u0026 _readMethod is not null \\u0026\\u0026 updateMethodProvider is not null)\\n```\\n\\n`updateMethodProvider` is set to non-null whenever a `ResourceOperationKind.Create` (PUT) or `ResourceOperationKind.Update` (PATCH) method exists (line 382), **regardless of whether the PATCH operation accepts a body parameter**.\\n\\nThe fallback path in `BaseTagMethodProvider.BuildElseStatements()` ([BaseTagMethodProvider.cs#L228](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/eng/packages/http-client-csharp-mgmt/generator/Azure.Generator.Management/src/Providers/TagMethodProviders/BaseTagMethodProvider.cs#L228)) then does:\\n\\n```csharp\\nvar updateParam = _updateMethodProvider.Signature.Parameters\\n    .Where(p =\\u003e !p.Type.Equals(typeof(WaitUntil))).First();\\n```\\n\\nThis assumes a body parameter exists. For a bodyless PATCH, this would either crash or produce nonsensical code.\\n\\n## Expected Behavior\\n\\nThe generator should **skip tag method generation** when:\\n- The resource has no PUT (`CreateOrUpdate`) operation, **and**\\n- The PATCH (`Update`) operation has **no request body** (i.e. no parameter to carry tag changes)\\n\\n## Evidence from Existing SDKs\\n\\nAnalysis of the existing generated SDKs shows this pattern clearly. Among the 34 `TrackedResourceData` resources without tag methods in the current repo:\\n\\n| Category | Count |\\n|---|---|\\n| No PATCH at all | 16 |\\n| PATCH exists but has no body | 16 |\\n| Has full CRUD (anomaly, AppService only) | 2 |\\n\\n**None** of the 34 have a PATCH with a body. Resources with bodyless PATCHes include:\\n- `ProviderMonitorSettingResource` (ProviderHub) — `UpdateAsync(CancellationToken)`\\n- `AppServiceCertificateOrderResource` (CertificateRegistration)\\n- `CosmosDBFleetResource` (CosmosDB)\\n- `LabPlanResource` / `LabResource` (LabServices)\\n- And 11 others\\n\\nIn contrast, **all 568** `TrackedResourceData` resources that correctly have tag methods also have either a PUT or a PATCH **with a body parameter**.\\n\\n## Suggested Fix\\n\\nIn `ResourceClientProvider.BuildMethods()`, add a check that the update method has a meaningful body parameter before generating tag methods. For example, in `PopulateUpdateClient()` or at the tag generation gate, verify that the PATCH method's input model contains parameters beyond `WaitUntil` and `CancellationToken`.\",\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"haiyuazhang\",\"id\":1924967,\"node_id\":\"MDQ6VXNlcjE5MjQ5Njc=\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1924967?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/haiyuazhang\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"User\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/haiyuazhang/subscriptions\"},\"assignee\":{\"login\":\"Copilot\",\"id\":198982749,\"node_id\":\"BOT_kgDOC9w8XQ\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/1143301?v=4\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/apps/copilot-swe-agent\",\"gravatar_id\":\"\",\"type\":\"Bot\",\"site_admin\":false,\"url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot\",\"events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/events{/privacy}\",\"following_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/following{/other_user}\",\"followers_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/followers\",\"gists_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/gists{/gist_id}\",\"organizations_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/orgs\",\"received_events_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/received_events\",\"repos_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/repos\",\"starred_url\":\"https://api.github.com/users/Copilot/starred{/owner}{/repo}\",\"subscriptions_
